Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Compel Answers To Peittioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
